Forge Solo
BCH2 + 1175 merge-mining
DashboardSettings
Not configured — set your BCH2 payout address below to start mining. Until then the node accepts miner connections but mining is paused.

Payout & mining setup

Your BCH2 payout address receives every block you solo-mine — the block's coinbase pays it directly on-chain (no separate payout transaction). Changes apply within a few seconds; no restart needed. A valid-but-wrong address is unrecoverable, so double-check it.

Connect your miner

Stratum URLstratum+tcp://…:3333
Worker usernameany label (e.g. rig1)
Passwordx (anything)

The worker username is only a label for the stats on this dashboard. All BCH2 block rewards go to the single payout address you set above — not to the worker username. Every share also merge-mines 1175 (ESF) for free when a 1175 address is set.

Open dashboard →

Merge-mining (1175 / ESF)

1175 (ESF) payout address—
Minimum payout—
Network difficulty—
Your hashrate—

1175 (ESF) is merge-mined at no extra hashrate cost. Its reward is paid on-chain directly to the ESF address above. Set that address in Payout & mining setup to turn merge-mining on.
